name: CreateCapture
description: Capture funds from an authorized payment. This endpoint is used to manually capture a payment that was created with captureMode: manual. By default, Mollie captures payments automatically, but for payments requiring manual capture, use this endpoint after collecting customer authorization. You can capture the full authorized amount or a partial amount. This endpoint requires the 'payments.write' scope.

payment_id.description: The ID of the payment to capture funds from. The payment must have been created with captureMode: manual.

amount_value.description: The amount to capture (e.g., '10.00'). If not provided, the full authorized amount will be captured. For partial captures, specify an amount less than or equal to the authorized amount.

amount_currency.description: The currency of the amount to capture (e.g., 'EUR', 'USD'). Required if amount_value is provided.

description.description: A description for this capture. This will be shown on statements and in the Mollie Dashboard.

metadata.description: Additional metadata to store with the capture. This can be any valid JSON object for your own reference.
